name: Bouches-du-Rhône (France)
description: A gold field with a blue pall (evoking the delta — the 'mouths' — of the Rhône), charged with a gold fleur-de-lis, and a red device across the top.
history: The arms of the département of Bouches-du-Rhône; the blue pall represents the mouths of the Rhône and the fleur-de-lis recalls royal France.

features.role: blue pall on gold — the mouths of the Rhône
a red device across the top of the pall
